descriptions.description: The 1ml amber vial with a plug closure protects single-use samples from light. Essential oil, perfume oil, and aromatherapy brands use this for trial sizes and sample discovery. Amber glass extends shelf life for light-sensitive formulations.
A 2ml clear vial with an 8-425 neck and cap. Perfume oil and essential oil brands use this for mini samples and wedding favors. The compact format fits in gift sets and promotional packs.
The 3ml vial with a 13-425 neck suits perfume and essential oil samples. Clear glass shows product color. A standard size for discovery sets, trade show giveaways, and sample discovery programs.

A 4ml vial with a 13-425 neck for perfume oil and essential oil samples. The slightly larger capacity suits brands that want a bit more product in each sample. Ideal for wedding favors and promotional packaging.
